claim_boundary: This is an exact equatorial geometry and conditional boundary/localization reduction. It does not identify observed spacetime, physical gauge groups or charges, a physical fermion equation, magnetic monopoles, measured couplings, an absolute unit, or full BHSM.
hemisphere: cutting S4 produces a mathematical boundary and requires GHY
independent_fields: not supplied by restriction or GHY
physical_boundary: requires a selected hemisphere/Z2 interpretation plus an action-supported boundary or localization sector
restriction: a bulk solution may be evaluated at the equator
